text: The Side Saddle Association was formed in 1974.
It aims to encourage and promote the practice of riding side saddle.
1. Eligibility to compete in the Side Saddle Equitation

and Fixture List, Newsletters and National Show

Please send your completed application form, payment and Direct Debit Form if applicable to:
Ms. Sally Lane, Hon. General Secretary, The Side Saddle Association, The Lodge, Glebe Farm,

In return for your help in reducing printing & postage costs, the Association is able to offer a reduction in the
available to those who pay by cheque, online or by direct debit;
available to full, associate and junior members willing to accept ALL SSA correspondence electronically, SSA Handbook
and membership points cards only will be posted.
FAMILY MEMBERSHIP- only available to online applications. •
LIFE MEMBERSHIP – available as online correspondence only (excepting Handbooks and membership cards) •
Subscriptions are due on 1st January annually or on joining.
A registration fee of £5.00 is payable on joining, or on renewing after 31st March. If the direct debit
form is not completed, a cheque administration fee of £4 is payable.
All Membership applications not made online must be accompanied by a cheque or postal order for the current
year. If the direct debit form is completed, the £4 cheque administration fee will be waived and the direct debit
automatically collected the following year. The subscription for the following years will be debited each January
thereafter as long as the direct debit instruction remains in force.
A new direct debit without a cheque will not be accepted.
Alternatively you can choose to renew online.
New members joining after 1st October will not be required to renew their membership until 31st December of the
The Council of the Side Saddle Association reserves the right to refuse any application for, or renewal
of, membership without giving a reason.

This Guarantee should be detached and retained by the Payer
This Guarantee is offered by all banks and building societies that accept instructions to pay Direct Debits
If there are any changes to the amount, date or frequency of your Direct Debit The Side Saddle Association will
notify you 40 working days in advance of your account being debited or as otherwise agreed. If you request The
Side Saddle Association to collect a payment, confirmation of the amount and date will be given to you at the time of
If an error is made in the payment of your Direct Debit by The Side Saddle Association or your bank or building
society you are entitled to a full and immediate refund of the amount paid from your bank or building society
If you receive a refund you are not entitled to, you must pay it back when The Side Saddle Association asks you to.
You can cancel a Direct Debit at any time by simply contacting your bank or building society. Written confirmation
may be required. Please also notify us.
